updates.tweet_text: Closing update #ES_F: Another slow day of summer trading and its easy as long as you are not overtrading chop. Trade the vol expansions, then get out, 7597, 7611, 7629, then 7639 are next when we breakout. Newsletter out soon with new supports and next dip buy later on
updates.notes: 7629 is newly named as a breakout target sequence level not in morning plan; 7597, 7611, 7639 are already-published levels and excluded.

updates.tweet_text: @JKThompsonES Great to hear and thanks for the subscribe!
updates.notes: Tweet is a social reply/thank-you with no price levels mentioned at all.

updates.tweet_text:
Another day of untradable summer chop in #ES_F. Summer trading = 95% riding long runners, 5% trading Failed Breakdowns. 7573-67 was support yesterday to take us to 7585, 7597, 7611 targets (all hit)

Plan: 7597 (weak), 7570-73 (watch traps)=supports. 7604, 7611, 7621, 7640 next https://t.co/HlFOsyhMXd
updates.notes: 7621 is the only unlisted price, but it appears in a directional target list alongside morning-plan levels (7604,7611,7640) with no explicit naming language — reaffirmation/list context, not a new actionable level.

updates.tweet_text: @IsshoKnows Engagement down in general I find. Many people read my posts though and simply don't like them. If people find the posts useful I would encourage them to like the posts

updates.tweet_text:
Up the targets we go already and as I've said daily for a month, summer trading = 95% just riding a long runner. Once every 1-3 days, we get a vol spike which creates a Failed Breakdown, allowing us to add size to longs, then we repeat.

7604 (hit), 7611 (hit), 7621, 7640 next https://t.co/twfnw3XivA
updates.notes: 7621 is named as a new upside target not in the morning plan. 7604/7611/7640 are morning-plan or hit levels. 7621 qualifies as actionable 'next' target.

updates.tweet_text:
3 out of 4 of today's targets hit in #ES_F And only 10am. Don't overcomplicate summer trading. 95% holding runners long. Every 1-3 days, we get a vol spike where we add size to longs. I only trade long, and I never short.

7604 (hit), 7611 (hit), 7621 (hit). Just 7640 left https://t.co/nfLBD0xt0j
updates.notes: 7604 and 7621 are observations of hit targets; 7611 and 7640 are morning-plan levels. No new actionable levels introduced.

updates.tweet_text: @Datmonster29 I don't add again unless we get a failed breakdown. I'm only getting paid in the sense that my runner continues to appreciate as targets hit
updates.notes: Trade management commentary about runner and targets hitting; no new actionable price level named.

updates.tweet_text: @lockingprofits Yes I did! I quit shorting in early 2024 though. I did short for my career prior to that though. There was an opportunity cost to playing those shorts though, I'd miss the Failed Breakdown squeeze afterwards and those are higher win rate
updates.notes: Conversational reply about trading style/history. No price levels named, no actionable entries, targets, or watches mentioned.

updates.tweet_text: @lockingprofits I didn't like how I'd catch a 40 point short then I'd miss the 150 point rip in an hour we'd get right after
updates.notes: Conversational reply about trading style/regret; no actionable price levels named whatsoever.
